settings.leadtext:
Classes are popular and book out in advance. 48 hours notice is required for cancellations and changes.

In Canberra classes can be run in Korean on request.
캔버라의 수업은 요청 시 한국어로 가르칠 수 있습니다
settings.content:
We offer a wide range of private and personally tailored courses to fit your needs. Some examples are:
Cupping Sessions: 1-hour cupping of a range of unique coffees selected from our freezer vault.

Personal Training: 2-3 hours coffee training (1-4 people) Using our tried and tested curriculum, or tailored to you.

Specialty Session: 2-3 hours of specialist coffee training in an area of your choosing to hone in on your skills or to develop new ones.

Looking for something that isn't listed? Get in touch!
